basic_details.job_title: ESIC Indore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 45 Teaching Faculty, Senior Residents Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees State Insurance Corporation Indore (ESIC Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation Indore (ESIC Indore) has released the official Teaching Faculty, Senior Residents Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 45 vacancies have been announced under the ESIC Indore Teaching Faculty & Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Professor: Max 69 years; Senior Resident: Max 45 years
age_limit.details: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor: Maximum age 69 years. Senior Resident: Maximum age 45 years.

qualification.details: Professor: MBBS, MD/MS/DNB/Other Examination, State/ NMC Medical Registration Certificate (updated). Retired/Working Professor may also apply. Associate Professor: MBBS, MD/MS/DNB/Other Examination, State/ NMC Medical Registration Certificate (updated). Assistant Professor: MBBS, MD/MS/DNB/Other Examination, State/ NMC Medical Registration Certificate (updated). Senior Resident: MBBS, MD/MS/DNB/Other Examination, State/ NMC Medical Registration Certificate (updated).

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: ₹123100.00, Associate Professor: ₹78800.00, Assistant Professor: ₹67700.00, Senior Resident: ₹67700.00
salary_details.professor: As per 7th CPC with fixed basic pay ₹123100.00
salary_details.associate professor: As per 7th CPC with fixed basic pay ₹78800.00
salary_details.assistant professor: As per 7th CPC with fixed basic pay ₹67700.00
salary_details.senior resident: As per 7th CPC with fixed basic pay ₹67700.00

selection_process: Selection will be made on the basis of acquired academic credentials and performance of candidate in interview before the Selection Board. Result will be displayed in Recruitments section of Website: www.esic.gov.in. Offer of Appointment will be sent through E-mail only.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Indore Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Indore Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Indore Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Indore Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Indore Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made on the basis of acquired academic credentials and performance of candidate in interview before the Selection Board. Result will be displayed in Recruitments section of Website: www.esic.gov.in. Offer of Appointment will be sent through E-mail only.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Indore Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Indore Teaching Faculty/Senior Residents posts?
faq.answer: The last date to send the scanned copy of the application form and required documents via email is 14-07-2026. The original documents must also reach by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Faculty/Senior Residents at ESIC Indore?
faq.answer: There are a total of 45 vacancies for Teaching Faculty/Senior Residents posts at ESIC Indore, including Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and Senior Resident positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ESIC Indore recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for all categories except SC/ST/ESIC (Regular Employee), Defence Ex-servicemen & PH Candidates, for whom the fee is Nil.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications include MBBS, MD/MS/DNB/Other Examination, and a valid State/NMC Medical Registration Certificate. Specific requirements may vary by post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Senior Residents at ESIC Indore?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Senior Residents is 45 years. For Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor, the maximum age limit is 69 years.

faq.question: Q6. How will the selection be done for these positions?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on acquired academic credentials and performance in an interview before the Selection Board.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies by post: Professor gets ₹123100.00, Associate Professor gets ₹78800.00, and Assistant Professor & Senior Resident get ₹67700.00, as per the 7th CPC with fixed basic pay.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for ESIC Indore recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is via email. Candidates need to send a scanned copy of the application and documents, followed by the original documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the walk-in date mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The walk-in date for the interview is 17-07-2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for ESIC Indore Teaching Faculty/Senior Residents posts?
faq.answer: The last date to send the scanned copy of the application form and required documents via email is 14-07-2026. The original documents must also reach by this date.
